common_execution.decision: At the close of the final observation bar.
common_execution.entry: Open of the next contiguous one-minute bar in the same explicit contract and trading session.
common_execution.exit: Close of the frozen terminal minute, or 15:09 CT if the planned exit would be later.
common_execution.overlap: At most one open trade per candidate; later signals are skipped until exit.
common_execution.roll: No signal may cross an explicit-contract or contiguous-segment boundary.
common_execution.costs: Product-specific V7 round-turn commission plus slippage model; stress multipliers 1.0, 1.5 and 2.0.
common_execution.risk_path: Conservative OHLC MFE/MAE; any same-bar favorable/adverse ordering ambiguity is recorded and may require later 1s/TBBO evidence.
common_execution.session_flatten: All positions flat no later than 15:10 CT.

hypotheses.economic_hypothesis: Benchmark and market-on-close participants must complete index inventory near settlement, so an unusually efficient 14:30-14:54 CT displacement continues until the 15:10 CT risk cutoff because passive liquidity suppliers cannot immediately absorb the forced flow.
hypotheses.who_pays: Benchmark-constrained and late market-on-close execution demand.

features.path_efficiency: abs(close_14:54-open_14:30) / sum(abs(one-minute close changes), with zero denominator rejected)
features.magnitude_threshold: 75th percentile of absolute displacement over the immediately preceding 60 eligible sessions only

hypotheses.economic_hypothesis: Inventory accumulated during the first Globex region is transferred to European participants at 02:00 CT, and unusually efficient overnight moves continue during that handoff because the incoming region must price the inherited directional inventory.
hypotheses.who_pays: Regional participants crossing inherited inventory at the liquidity handoff.
hypotheses.observation_window_CT: 17:00:00 previous calendar day inclusive to 02:00:00 trading day exclusive

features.magnitude_threshold: 75th percentile of absolute displacement over the immediately preceding 60 eligible sessions only

hypotheses.economic_hypothesis: Repeated tests of a ninety-minute extreme without escape accumulate stop orders outside the range; the first material break releases those stops and continues for thirty minutes before liquidity can restock.
hypotheses.who_pays: Protective stop orders and late liquidity providers outside a repeatedly tested range.
hypotheses.touch_definition: A completed one-minute high (low) within two minimum ticks of the preceding-window high (low); require at least three distinct touch bars separated by at least five minutes.
hypotheses.break_definition: Close exceeds the preceding ninety-minute extreme by max(two ticks, 0.10 times the past-only 20-session median RTH range).
hypotheses.activation: First qualifying upside or downside break per trading day only.

hypotheses.economic_hypothesis: Risk mandates force directional inventory reduction into Friday's final forty minutes, and the distortion partially reverses during Monday's first cash-session hour when weekend risk has resolved.
hypotheses.who_pays: Friday risk-reduction flows from mandates that cannot carry weekend exposure.
hypotheses.magnitude_threshold: Median absolute Friday-window displacement over the immediately preceding 52 eligible Fridays only; require at least 12 prior Fridays.
hypotheses.activation: Friday absolute displacement >= past-only median and the next eligible session is Monday.

hypotheses.economic_hypothesis: A large early cash-session ES shock forces portfolio hedges into gold and crude with a delay; when the target market has not already repriced, the lagged safe-haven or growth-sensitive response remains tradeable for the next hour.
hypotheses.who_pays: Cross-asset allocators and hedgers executing sequential rather than simultaneous portfolio adjustments.
hypotheses.source_threshold: 80th percentile of absolute ES source-window displacement over the immediately preceding 60 eligible sessions only
hypotheses.target_nonconfirmation: Absolute target displacement over the same window is below 0.50 times its own past-only 60-session 80th percentile
hypotheses.synchronization: Both source and target bars must be completed and timestamp-aligned; no contemporaneous unfinished-bar information.

stage3.folds: four contiguous numpy.array_split blocks of Chicago trading days
stage3.purge: exact maximum holding horizon at every boundary

grammar_tripwire.episode_start_policy: maximum 24 block-aware starts, minimum spacing 10 sessions, 60-session horizon
grammar_tripwire.primary_diagnostic: NULL_RATIO = pooled null Combine pass rate / real Combine pass rate; this is a tripwire only and never a fitness or promotion objective
grammar_tripwire.minimum_null_episode_count: at least the real episode count for each control

selection.graveyard_feedback_level: mechanism_class x regime x death_cause only

CONTRE: These hypotheses encode plausible counterparties but the fixed clock windows may still proxy generic intraday seasonality; the full-signal null tripwire and multiplicity-adjusted walk-forward are required before any candidate fiche can be frozen.
